title: rhododendron × davisianum
intro: Rhododendron × davisianum, also known as Davis' azalea, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Rhododendron viscosum and Rhododendron periclymenoides. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Rhododendron × davisianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and serve as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron × davisianum typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
